The '''Kothos twins''', also known as the '''Reborn twins''', referred to [[Vil Kothos]] and [[Dasariah Kothos]]. They did not use [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] but instead were extremely skilled in using the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], primarily utilizing [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force Push]] and [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]] to dispatch their foes.<ref name="JA">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>

As two of the most capable Force users in [[Tavion Axmis]]' ranks, the twins often accompanied her on her missions to drain Force energy from various sites around the galaxy. While operating at [[Bast Castle]] on [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] with [[Rosh Penin]], the twins encountered [[Jaden Korr]] and empowered Rosh with additional Force energy, healing his wounds as he dueled Korr. Despite their combined efforts Korr eventually overcame and killed the twins first, disarming Rosh shortly after.<ref name="JA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
